title: Gold and silver attract investor interest after gold's fall
summary: Silver outperforms other assets, gold recovers, and marketing and cryptocurrency figures take an interest in the precious metal.

title: Mergers and acquisitions: Chery, Gymshark, Apollo and Paramount lead corporate deals
summary: Appetite for mergers continues with Chery's purchase of Nissan's factory, Gymshark's buyback, Apollo's investments, and Paramount's renewal of its buyback program.

title: Ibex 35 approaches 20,000 points after a week of strong gains
summary: The Spanish index extends its winning streak to a fourth week with gains of over 2%, driven by ArcelorMittal and Acerinox.

title: German DAX reaches record highs and surpasses 26,000 points
summary: The German index continues its record streak driven by investor confidence and positive economic data.

title: AI chip sector captures attention with moves from Cerebras, Micron, and Meituan
summary: Cerebras rises after its IPO, Michael Burry bets against Micron, and Meituan trains a massive model with domestic chips.

title: Iran contacts Japan to sell oil as Brent could fall to $60
summary: The oil market sees multiple developments: Iran's outreach to Japanese buyers, increased traffic in Hormuz, and Canada's plans for a new pipeline.

title: Lockheed negotiates purchase of Ultra Maritime and Japanese-British-Italian fighter program advances
summary: The defense industry sees major corporate moves and joint development among allied nations.

title: European banking restructures: N26, Starling Bank, and Julius Baer announce changes
summary: N26 eliminates free securities trading, Starling Bank cuts jobs, and Julius Baer appoints new CFO.

title: Investors seek dividend yield in AGNC, the DAX, and Repsol
summary: High-yield dividends attract investors in a low-interest-rate environment.

title: US employment and PMI data ease interest rate fears
summary: The June jobs report and services PMI show a resilient economy that could allow a pause in rate hikes.

title: US market sentiment swings between volatility and earnings forecasts
summary: Investors face volatility while earnings forecasts hit record levels and the Fed remains in focus.

title: Tech stocks show resilience with moves from Apple, IonQ, and Deutsche Telekom
summary: Apple reacts, quantum computing gains interest, and Deutsche Telekom presents new opportunities.

title: Financial planning for retirement and inheritance takes center stage
summary: Investors seek advice on retirement costs, inheritance tax deductions, and options for living abroad.

title: Corporate earnings forecasts generate expectations on Wall Street and in Europe
summary: Peloton shows signs of recovery, Gestamp attracts Deutsche Bank's attention, and S&P 500 earnings forecasts hit highs.

title: London stock market rises to four-month highs driven by utilities and mining
summary: The FTSE 100 hits its highest level in four months thanks to the strong performance of defensive sectors.

title: Lagarde opens the door to early departure from ECB
summary: The ECB president does not rule out leaving her post earlier than expected, according to statements to the German press.

title: SpaceX prepares to join the Nasdaq 100 as its stock falls 30%
summary: Elon Musk's company joins the Nasdaq 100, raising doubts about whether it's a good time to buy.

title: Yen and Danish krone capture attention in currency markets
summary: The yen remains under pressure while the Danish krone records a historic fall, and the euro remains stable against the dollar.

title: European real estate market adapts with new sale strategies and joint ventures
summary: Real estate transactions adjust to market conditions with intra-family sales and international collaborations such as Colonial and Generali.

title: Bloom Energy and new Canadian pipeline set the energy agenda
summary: Bloom Energy bets on fuel cells while Canada plans a pipeline to reduce its dependence on the US.
